description: Vielzeug (German for 'many tools') — 20 independent zero-dependency TypeScript packages in a Rush.js monorepo. Each package targets ES2022 and ships ESM + CJS via Vite library mode. Entry point: packages/<name>/src/index.ts. Tests use Vitest. Docs are VitePress at docs/. The MCP server at packages/mcpit/ exposes all docs and APIs to AI clients.
